summary: dijkstraDistances returns single-source shortest distances over a directed weighted graph; unreachable nodes are Infinity.
bellmanFordDistances returns shortest distances allowing negative edges, or null when a negative cycle is reachable from the source.
bfsHopCounts returns the shortest hop count from a source in an unweighted graph given adjacency lists; unreachable is -1.
topoOrderKahn returns a topological order (smallest id first on ties) via Kahn, or an empty array if the graph has a cycle.
connectedComponentsCount returns the number of connected components in an undirected graph.
hasCycleUndirected reports whether an undirected graph contains a cycle.
gridBfsSteps returns the minimum 4-directional steps between two grid cells where 1 is a wall and 0 is open, or -1 if unreachable.
detectCycleDirected reports whether a directed graph has a cycle.
